descriptionText: Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026The Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026 offers a dependable blend of comfort, efficiency and thoughtful design, making her a solid option for private cruising or commercial use. Presented in good condition, she is a well‑equipped power catamaran that provides generous living areas, practical systems and a layout suited to both long‑range passages and relaxed coastal trips.Her exterior design for Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026 centres around a panoramic flybridge, an area that feels open and well planned. The composite hardtop incorporates solar panels, while the space itself includes an L‑shaped bar fitted with a fridge, sink and icemaker. This makes the upper deck suitable for social time at anchor or during calm cruising. Aft, she offers another outdoor bar and a large dining table, giving guests several options for gathering and dining outdoors. The 1,000‑kg hydraulic platform and watertoys garage add practical flexibility for handling tenders or water equipment.The decks, cockpit and flybridge are finished in solid teak, paired with Sunbrella upholstery and wide panoramic windows. Inside, the layout includes an owner’s suite and three VIP cabins, each benefiting from individual air‑conditioning controls. Details such as electric blinds and a 32‑bottle wine cellar contribute to a comfortable onboard experience without excess.Her galley is fully equipped with Miele appliances, including large-capacity refrigerators, a separate freezer, induction cooktop, dishwasher and electric oven. A washer and dryer are also fitted, which is convenient for longer stays on board. An interior bar with a wine cooler and cigar humidor provides added storage and service space for entertaining.The Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026 is powered by two MAN i6 800 HP engines. These are paired with steel shafts, five‑blade propellers and rope cutters. The setup is built for reliability and manageable running performance. For onboard energy, she carries two 22.5 kVA generators alongside a 72 kWh lithium battery bank supported by Victron chargers. She also includes both 220V/50 Hz and 120V/60 Hz inverters, offering flexibility for various electrical needs. A full domotic system handles lighting, pumps, tank monitoring, batteries and alarms.Her autonomy is supported by a fuel capacity of 10,000 litres in twin tanks, as well as dual watermakers producing 95 L/h (24V) and 280 L/h (220V). Freshwater capacity totals 1,600 litres, and the air‑conditioning system features redundancy for reliability in warmer climates.Navigation and electronics are Raymarine-based, with twin Axiom XL 16-inch displays, HD radar, Evolution autopilot, AIS 700 and dual‑station modular VHF. Exterior night‑vision cameras add clarity during low‑light operations. Six underwater LED lights, ambient exterior lighting and dedicated foredeck and cockpit spotlights improve visibility and ambience.Safety equipment includes a bow thruster to assist with manoeuvring and a Fire Pro system dedicated to the battery compartment. Her MCA Category 2 certification makes her suitable for commercial charter.Specifications • Panoramic flybridge with composite hardtop and integrated solar panels • L‑shaped flybridge bar with fridge, sink and icemaker • Aft outdoor bar and large dining table • 1,000‑kg hydraulic platform and watertoys garage • Solid teak decks, Sunbrella upholstery, panoramic windows • Owner’s suite + 3 VIP cabins, electric blinds, 150,000 BTU air‑conditioning • 32‑bottle wine cellar • Fully equipped galley with Miele appliances • Interior bar with wine cooler and cigar humidor • 2 × MAN i6 800 HP engines, steel shafts, 5‑blade propellers • 2 × 22.5 kVA generators, 72 kWh lithium battery bank • 220V/50 Hz and 120V/60 Hz inverters, full domotic system • 10,000 L fuel capacity; dual watermakers (95 L/h and 280 L/h) • 1,600 L freshwater capacity, redundant air‑conditioning • Raymarine electronics with twin 16" displays, radar, AIS, autopilot • Night‑vision cameras, underwater LED lights, exterior lighting • Bow thruster, Fire Pro system, MCA Category 2 certification.
descriptionHtml:
Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026

The Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026 offers a dependable blend of comfort, efficiency and thoughtful design, making her a solid option for private cruising or commercial use. Presented in good condition, she is a well‑equipped power catamaran that provides generous living areas, practical systems and a layout suited to both long‑range passages and relaxed coastal trips.

Her exterior design  for Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026 centres around a panoramic flybridge, an area that feels open and well planned. The composite hardtop incorporates solar panels, while the space itself includes an L‑shaped bar fitted with a fridge, sink and icemaker. This makes the upper deck suitable for social time at anchor or during calm cruising. Aft, she offers another outdoor bar and a large dining table, giving guests several options for gathering and dining outdoors. The 1,000‑kg hydraulic platform and watertoys garage add practical flexibility for handling tenders or water equipment.

The decks, cockpit and flybridge are finished in solid teak, paired with Sunbrella upholstery and wide panoramic windows. Inside, the layout includes an owner’s suite and three VIP cabins, each benefiting from individual air‑conditioning controls. Details such as electric blinds and a 32‑bottle wine cellar contribute to a comfortable onboard experience without excess.

Her galley is fully equipped with Miele appliances, including large-capacity refrigerators, a separate freezer, induction cooktop, dishwasher and electric oven. A washer and dryer are also fitted, which is convenient for longer stays on board. An interior bar with a wine cooler and cigar humidor provides added storage and service space for entertaining.

The Sunreef 60 Power 16p For Sale 2026 is powered by two MAN i6 800 HP engines. These are paired with steel shafts, five‑blade propellers and rope cutters. The setup is built for reliability and manageable running performance. For onboard energy, she carries two 22.5 kVA generators alongside a 72 kWh lithium battery bank supported by Victron chargers. She also includes both 220V/50 Hz and 120V/60 Hz inverters, offering flexibility for various electrical needs. A full domotic system handles lighting, pumps, tank monitoring, batteries and alarms.

Her autonomy is supported by a fuel capacity of 10,000 litres in twin tanks, as well as dual watermakers producing 95 L/h (24V) and 280 L/h (220V). Freshwater capacity totals 1,600 litres, and the air‑conditioning system features redundancy for reliability in warmer climates.

Navigation and electronics are Raymarine-based, with twin Axiom XL 16-inch displays, HD radar, Evolution autopilot, AIS 700 and dual‑station modular VHF. Exterior night‑vision cameras add clarity during low‑light operations. Six underwater LED lights, ambient exterior lighting and dedicated foredeck and cockpit spotlights improve visibility and ambience.

Safety equipment includes a bow thruster to assist with manoeuvring and a Fire Pro system dedicated to the battery compartment. Her MCA Category 2 certification makes her suitable for commercial charter.

Specifications 
• Panoramic flybridge with composite hardtop and integrated solar panels
• L‑shaped flybridge bar with fridge, sink and icemaker
• Aft outdoor bar and large dining table
• 1,000‑kg hydraulic platform and watertoys garage
• Solid teak decks, Sunbrella upholstery, panoramic windows
• Owner’s suite + 3 VIP cabins, electric blinds, 150,000 BTU air‑conditioning
• 32‑bottle wine cellar
• Fully equipped galley with Miele appliances
• Interior bar with wine cooler and cigar humidor
• 2 × MAN i6 800 HP engines, steel shafts, 5‑blade propellers
• 2 × 22.5 kVA generators, 72 kWh lithium battery bank
• 220V/50 Hz and 120V/60 Hz inverters, full domotic system
• 10,000 L fuel capacity; dual watermakers (95 L/h and 280 L/h)
• 1,600 L freshwater capacity, redundant air‑conditioning
• Raymarine electronics with twin 16" displays, radar, AIS, autopilot
• Night‑vision cameras, underwater LED lights, exterior lighting
• Bow thruster, Fire Pro system, MCA Category 2 certification.
